texto: Then what do we call you?" another of the heat forms asked. "We are Rutan." "Our species need something a little more particular," the first heat form of the Time Lord said. "I think we’ll call you Fred, for ease of reference.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de David A. McIntee que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “Then what do we call you?" another of the heat forms asked. "We are Rutan." "Our species need som…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, doctor-who, fifth-doctor, com foco em fifth-doctor e humour.

frase_original: Then what do we call you?" another of the heat forms asked. "We are Rutan." "Our species need something a little more particular," the first heat form of the Time Lord said. "I think we’ll call you Fred, for ease of reference.

texto: There's an emergency link to the defence grid, but that's only for use in the direst emergencies." "And of course a mile-long unknown intruder approaching your main source of power isn't an emergency?" Karan hesitated, his chins wobbling slightly with their own momentum. "It'll take time, but I could access the defence grid's sensor logs for that sector..." "I won't tell if you don't.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de David A. McIntee que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “There's an emergency link to the defence grid, but that's only for use in the direst emergencies.…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre tempo, doctor-who, humour, com foco em humour.
